data.body: PREPLANNING_CONTEXT: {"version":1,"epicId":"9213-2746","generatedAt":"2026-04-18T20:23:08Z","generatedBy":"preplanning","epic":{"title":"Tag management CLI with PIL-guarded brainstorm:complete add","description":"First-class ticket tag/untag CLI with PIL-heading guard on brainstorm:complete; refactor all full-replacement tag writers to additive CLI except migration script (provenance carve-out); document tag policy.","successCriteria":["ticket tag <id> <tag> adds, preserves, idempotent","ticket untag <id> <tag> removes, preserves, idempotent; brainstorm:complete removable","ticket tag <id> brainstorm:complete rejected without PIL heading in any event","4+ call sites refactored; new call sites <= 3 lines","Tag policy documented in architecture doc + cross-refs from contract docs","Round-trip validation (apply / untag / re-apply with PIL intact)"]},"stories":[{"id":"20f3-c62a","title":"As a practitioner, I can add and remove tags on any ticket via first-class CLI commands","description":"Add ticket tag / ticket untag CLI commands backed by _tag_add and _tag_remove helpers in ticket-lib.sh; thin wrapper scripts ticket-tag.sh and ticket-untag.sh. Idempotent, preserves siblings, pins empty-tag-set shape to data.fields.tags: [] (matches ticket-edit.sh).","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When this story is complete, ticket tag appends preserving siblings and is idempotent. Satisfies SC1.","When this story is complete, ticket untag removes preserving siblings and is idempotent. Satisfies SC2.","When this story is complete, untag-to-empty emits EDIT event with data.fields.tags: [] (not data.tags: []), asserted by unit test. Satisfies SC2 (F4).","Unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic."],"considerations":["[Testing] Bash tests for add/remove/idempotence/sibling-preservation/empty-tag-set-shape","[Reliability] Read-merge-write race accepted (same tolerance as ticket edit --tags=)","[Maintainability] Helper lib centralizes logic reused by Story 3's call-site refactor"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":[],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC1, SC2"},{"id":"c095-26fe","title":"As the ticket system, I reject applying brainstorm:complete without evidence of scrutiny","description":"Port _ticket_has_pil from migration script to ticket-lib.sh and FIX it to also scan data.fields.description for EDIT events (not just data.description + data.body). Add _tag_add_checked wrapper that gates brainstorm:complete on PIL presence; ticket-tag.sh dispatches via _tag_add_checked. Clear error pointing to /dso:brainstorm.","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When this story is complete, ticket tag brainstorm:complete without PIL fails with non-zero exit and actionable message. Satisfies SC3.","When this story is complete, _ticket_has_pil correctly scans CREATE data.description, EDIT data.fields.description, and COMMENT data.body, with unit tests for each branch. Satisfies SC3 (F2).","When this story is complete, non-brainstorm:complete tags add without PIL check. Satisfies SC3.","When this story is complete, round-trip (tag / untag / re-tag with PIL intact) succeeds with no lost siblings. Satisfies SC6.","Unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic."],"considerations":["[Naming] _tag_add (Story 1) and _tag_add_checked (this story) are separate functions so Story 1's helper name is honest at its merge boundary (F5)","[Testing] Acceptance branches: PIL in CREATE/EDIT/COMMENT; rejection: no PIL anywhere","[Maintainability] Migration script keeps its private _ticket_has_pil copy until Story 3 decides the provenance question (option a)"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["20f3-c62a"],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC3, SC6"},{"id":"d808-cba0","title":"As a DSO skill, I apply and remove tags via the first-class CLI instead of open-coding merge logic","description":"Refactor 6 tag-write call sites to additive CLI: brainstorm Phase 3 Step 3a (scrutiny:pending untag + brainstorm:complete tag), brainstorm Step 2.27 interaction:deferred (F1 - also update interaction-deferred-tag.md contract example), design-approve.sh, ui-designer-dispatch-protocol.md, roadmap SCRUTINY_OPT_IN=false path (F8). Migration script EXCLUDED to preserve its author + env_id provenance (F3 option a). End-to-end smoke test uses EDIT-event PIL fixture (F6).","priority":3,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When this story is complete, brainstorm Phase 3 Step 3a writes via ticket tag/untag. Satisfies SC4.","When this story is complete, brainstorm Step 2.27 writes/removes interaction:deferred via ticket tag/untag + contract example updated. Satisfies SC4 (F1).","When this story is complete, design-approve.sh uses ticket tag. Satisfies SC4.","When this story is complete, roadmap SCRUTINY_OPT_IN=false path uses ticket tag. Satisfies SC4 (F8).","When this story is complete, grep for ticket edit --tags outside migration script and fixtures returns zero hits in plugins/dso/. Satisfies SC4.","When this story is complete, end-to-end smoke with EDIT-event PIL fixture confirms brainstorm:complete accepted on production path. Satisfies SC6 (F6).","Unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic."],"considerations":["[Maintainability] Migration script keeps direct-write path to preserve author=ticket-migrate-brainstorm-tags and dedicated env_id (F3 option a)","[Testing] Smoke test must place PIL via EDIT event, not CREATE description (F6)","[Maintainability] Open-coded full-replacement tag writes drop from 6 to 0 outside migration script"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["20f3-c62a","c095-26fe"],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC4, SC6"},{"id":"c120-9e90","title":"As a future maintainer, I can read the tag policy in the architecture doc","description":"Document tag policy in ticket-system-v3-architecture.md: guarded tags (brainstorm:complete + PIL), unguarded tags (flexibility), writer taxonomy (additive vs full-replacement migration-script carve-out), accepted limitations (race, source-enforcement). Cross-refs from scrutiny-pending-tag.md and interaction-deferred-tag.md. CLAUDE.md Quick Reference entries. Serves as the epic's Documentation Update Story.","priority":3,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When this story is complete, architecture doc has a Tag Policy section listing guarded/unguarded tags, writer taxonomy, and accepted limitations with migration-script carve-out. Satisfies SC5 (F7).","When this story is complete, the two contract docs cross-reference the new policy section. Satisfies SC5.","When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md Quick Reference lists ticket tag and ticket untag. Satisfies SC5."],"considerations":["[Maintainability] Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md conventions","[Documentation] Policy must describe ALL tag writers including migration-script carve-out (F7)"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["20f3-c62a","c095-26fe","d808-cba0"],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC5"}],"storyDashboard":{"totalStories":4,"uiStories":0,"criticalPath":["20f3-c62a","c095-26fe","d808-cba0","c120-9e90"]},"adversarialReview":{"redTeamFindings":8,"blueTeamAccepted":8,"blueTeamRejected":0,"appliedSummary":{"new_stories":0,"modified_done_definitions":3,"new_dependencies":0,"new_considerations":3,"absorbed_into_existing_story_scope":2},"artifactPath":"/tmp/workflow-plugin-8c20e0fd310e4beb/adversarial-review-9213-2746.json"}}
